# OMP Official Sources Snapshot

These files record the official OMP/GitHub sources used to prepare this repository. For implementation, check the live upstream docs or installed OMP package if behavior differs.

Primary URLs:

- https://github.com/can1357/oh-my-pi
- https://omp.sh/
- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/can1357/oh-my-pi/main/docs/extensions.md
- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/can1357/oh-my-pi/main/docs/hooks.md
- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/can1357/oh-my-pi/main/docs/skills.md
- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/can1357/oh-my-pi/main/docs/mcp-config.md
- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/can1357/oh-my-pi/main/docs/extension-loading.md
- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/can1357/oh-my-pi/main/docs/mcp-server-tool-authoring.md
- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/can1357/oh-my-pi/main/packages/coding-agent/DEVELOPMENT.md
